sections.name: listening
sections.description: Part 1 (5 items): Listen to a word/phrase and choose the matching picture from options. Part 2 (5 items): Listen to a short sentence and judge if it matches the picture shown. Part 3 (5 items): Listen to a short dialogue and choose the correct answer. Part 4 (5 items): Listen to a short sentence and choose the correct response.

sections.name: reading
sections.description: Part 1 (5 items): Match a word to its corresponding picture. Part 2 (5 items): Read a sentence and identify the correct picture. Part 3 (5 items): Fill in a blank in a sentence with the correct word. Part 4 (5 items): Read short sentences and choose the correct response.

scoring_notes: Each section scored 0–100. Total is sum of sections. 120/200 required to pass. No writing section at HSK 1.
